# 👤 Staffing Needs

> 💡 **Insight:** UBUNIFU SACCO requires a professional, multi-skilled staff complement across financial operations, governance, product development, technology, member services, risk management, and network partnerships.

---

## 📋 Staff Complement Overview

To successfully establish and operationalize UBUNIFU SACCO over the 5-year period (January 2026 – December 2031), the following departments and roles are required:

> 🎯 **Target:** Total Staff Complement: **98–146 staff over 5 years (phased hiring)**

---

## 📊 Staffing Matrix

| **Position / Department** | **Number of Staff** | **Key Qualifications & Experience** | **Core Responsibilities** |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Executive / Leadership Team** | 10 | Bachelor’s degree or higher in Finance, Business Administration, or related field. At least 7–10 years of experience in financial institutions (microfinance, SACCOs, banks) or startup financing; leadership experience; understanding of tech / creative sectors preferred. | Provide strategic direction, oversee operations, ensure compliance with laws/regulations, represent UBUNIFU SACCO in external partnerships, fundraising, stakeholder relations, policy, and governance. |
| **SACCO Manager / CEO** | 1 | Master’s or Bachelor’s plus strong track record in managing SACCOs, cooperatives or microfinance. Experience in credit, savings, investor relations. | Oversee daily operations; ensure the SACCO meets its financial & social objectives; manage senior staff; ensure sound governance; liaison with board and shareholders. |
| **Finance & Accounting Department** | 8–12 | Degrees in Accounting, Finance, or related field; CPA/ACCA or equivalent; familiarity with Uganda’s financial regulatory environment; experience in SACCOs or MFIs/fintech. | Manage accounts, budgeting, financial reporting, auditing, ensure statutory compliance (tax, cooperative law etc.), manage liquidity, interest calculations, share capital accounting. |
| **Credit / Loans Department** | 23–35 | Training in risk management, micro/SME lending; ability to assess startup and creative enterprise risk; experience with non-traditional collateral or alternative credit scoring. | Product design and management for credit products; loan appraisal; monitoring and recovery; credit risk evaluations; managing delinquency; ensuring loans align with innovation/milestone metrics. |
| **Member Services / Customer Relations** | 13–24 | Strong customer service orientation; good communication skills; basic knowledge of financial products; experience with digital platforms; preferably multilingual (English + local languages). | Handle member onboarding; member support (queries, complaints, education); savings mobilization and awareness; promotional campaigns; training of members on products and digital tools. |
| **Technology / IT & Innovation** | 8–13 | Degrees or diplomas in Computer Science, IT, or related. Experience in fintech / software development, MIS, data security, mobile/web platforms; experience with integrating payments (mobile money, APIs etc.). | Set up and maintain the SACCO management system (MIS); develop mobile/web app for members; ensure cybersecurity and data protection; tech maintenance; lead innovation pilot projects. |
| **Business Development / Partnerships / Innovation Support** | 5 | Experience in startup ecosystems, incubation, innovation networks; knowledge of investment, grants, scaling; good networking and negotiation ability. | Identify, develop, and manage partnerships with innovation hubs, universities, investors; organize incubator programs or competitions; support members in grant access; foster networks. |
| **Operations & Compliance / Risk Management** | 6–13 | Strong background in internal audit, compliance, risk, legal/regulatory frameworks; cooperative law; knowledge of data protection, anti-money laundering (AML) etc. | Ensure compliance with cooperative law and financial regulations; internal audit; risk assessments; fraud prevention; policy drafting & enforcement; ensure sound operational processes and controls. |
| **Communications, Marketing & Outreach** | 5 | Training in communications, marketing or public relations; experience in digital marketing; understanding of creative/tech sectors; ability to design campaigns. | Develop branding, communications and marketing strategy; manage outreach to potential and existing members; digital / social media; run awareness campaigns; promote SACCO products. |
| **Monitoring, Evaluation & Learning (MEL)** | 3–5 | Experience in M&E in financial or development sector; ability to develop key performance indicators, baseline studies, impact measurement; data collection & analysis skills. | Design MEL framework; track performance of SACCO in terms of financial, social and innovation impact; gather feedback from members; periodic reporting; adapt services based on lessons learned. |
| **Administrative & Support Staff** | 8–13 | Diploma or certificate in business administration; good organizational, record-keeping and clerical skills; exposure to financial environment is a plus. | Front desk, clerical duties; file management; basic member documentation; scheduling; logistics for events and training; office management; ensuring smooth support services. |
